data.name: My VALENTINE is a FEMBOY
data.detailed_description:
Male on Femboy, Femboy on Male

Valentine's Day...that dreaded day where you're supposed to feel lonely if you don't have a special someone. What's worse, is that your GF recently broke up with you, and everything reminds you of her, despite the fact that she often made you feel miserable.

A day before Valentine's Day a special someone just happens to fall into your lap, or rather, a scolding cup of coffee did. Nonetheless, you hit it of with this stranger, finding that you have quite a lot in common... 🍆

Read through some pretty raunchy(erotic) dialogue, accompanied by spicy nude depictions.

Gameplay
  • Choose your sexual role (Top or Bottom)
  • H-Scenes
  • ~7K words

Immerse yourself in the story by typing in your own name, then proceeding to read through a raunchy story from the first-person perspective.

data.short_description: A day before Valentine's Day a special someone just happens to fall into your lap.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz Pentium 4
  • 記憶體: 400 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
